_description: Full procurement lifecycle: requisitions with lines, 3-stage approval process (Tier 2), goods receipts with lines, payments. Budget integration via entry-based ledger from app_erp_budget. Procurement spend artifact for analytics.
_organizations_note: Organizations and tenants defined in app_erp_base. Load app_erp_base first.
_tenants_note: Tenants defined in app_erp_base. Load app_erp_base first.

description.en: Lifecycle states for a procurement requisition
Priority levels for procurement requisitions
Lifecycle states for a goods receipt
Lifecycle states for a procurement payment
A request to procure goods or services. Contains one or more requisition lines, each targeting a budget line.
A line item on a procurement requisition representing a specific resource request with quantity and price
A record of goods or services received against a procurement requisition
A line item on a goods receipt representing actual quantity received against a requisition line
A payment record for a completed procurement
Artifact target universal for procurement spend aggregation by fiscal period, department, and entry type
Creates and submits procurement requisitions
Reviews department need, validates priority and specifications
Validates budget availability and GL coding
Final approval for requisitions above threshold. Strategic alignment review.
Tier 2 approval process for procurement requisitions. 3 stages: Department Review, Finance Review, Executive Approval (conditional on amount threshold). Each stage has role-based obligations.
Department manager reviews need, priority, and specifications
Finance controller validates budget availability and GL coding
CFO final approval. Conditional: only activates when requisition total exceeds threshold (e.g. $10,000).
Obligation for department manager to review and decide on requisition
Obligation for finance controller to validate budget and GL coding
Obligation for CFO to give final approval on high-value requisitions
Composition: requisition contains one or more requisition lines
Links requisition to a vendor (erp-party from party app)
Links requisition to a fiscal period
Links a requisition line to the budget line it draws from
Links a requisition line to the resource being procured
Links a goods receipt to the requisition it fulfills
Composition: goods receipt contains one or more receipt lines
Maps a receipt line to the requisition line it fulfills
Links a payment to the requisition it settles
Current lifecycle status of the requisition
Computed: sum of all line totals
Computed advisory: true only if all budget-line groups have sufficient balance. Not authoritative at approval time.
Computed: true when total exceeds $10,000 threshold
Computed: quantity * unit_price
Computed advisory: grouped demand (sum of all sibling lines targeting same budget line) <= available balance. Same value for lines sharing a budget line.
Computed: quantity_received * actual_unit_price
Dimension: requisition status derived from parent via relator path
Dimension: requisition priority derived from parent via relator path
Measure: Sum of line totals (qty × unit_price)
Measure: Count of requisition lines
Emitted when a requisition is submitted for approval
Emitted when a requisition passes all approval stages and budget is committed
Emitted when a requisition is rejected at any approval stage
Emitted when a goods receipt is created for a requisition
Emitted when payment is completed for a procurement
Emitted when procurement spend reaches warning threshold on budget position
Emitted when procurement spend exceeds budget allocation
Procurement requisition lifecycle: multi-line requisitions, 3-stage approval process (Tier 2), goods receipts, payments. Budget integration via entry-based ledger from app_erp_budget.
Core procurement operations: requisitions, lines, receipts, payments. Publishes lifecycle events.
Procurement spend analytics and budget threshold monitoring
Computes line_total = quantity * unit_price for each requisition line

computations.formula: let qty = quantity.value; let price = unit_price.value; qty * price

description.en: Aggregates line totals from all lines via composition relator
Sets flag when requisition total exceeds $10,000 threshold for stage 3 activation

computations._comment: === COMPUTATION 4: Receipt Line Total = qty_received * actual_price ===

description.en: Computes receipt line total = quantity_received * actual_unit_price

computations.formula: let qty = qty_received.value; let price = actual_price.value; qty * price

artifact_definitions._comment: === Procurement Spend by Status and Priority ===
artifact_definitions._note: Sources from procurement-req-line. Aggregates line totals by parent requisition status and priority via RelatorPath through procurement-req-has-line-rel.
artifact_definitions.name: Procurement Spend by Status and Priority

description.en: Aggregates procurement requisition lines by requisition status and priority. Provides total line value and line count for the procurement dashboard.

foundation_role_assignments._comment: === Demo super-user: full access to procurement ===

functional_role_assignments._comment: Demo user can approve at department review stage
Demo user can approve at finance review stage
Demo user can approve at executive approval stage (>$10K)
